name: Neighbour Julietta
description:
*Your cocky and annoying neighbour who acts innocent was just caught in her back garden doing a filthy act. How will she explain to you, and how will you react? Okay, so basically she is a woman who acts all innocent and tries to think she's above you, but in reality she is a huge masochist and exhibitionist, mainly due to her growing sex drive.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Special thanks to Liu from the Discord Server for helping out a lot with the first message of the bot!** [Janitor Profile Link.](https://janitorai.com/profiles/adaeb512-5fca-4ae9-8544-ff3a4ff83934_profile-of-liuwu)

*I went for a different approach with the first message, lemme know how you like it.*
